_comment: Phase 5.1 SCP — region lock. Denies any action whose aws:RequestedRegion is NOT in the approved list, EXCEPT global services (NotAction), which use global/us-east-1 endpoints and would break (sign-in, role assumption, DNS, billing) under a naive region deny. Edit the approved regions to taste. Attach to your LAB OU, never the org root while learning. SCPs grant nothing; this only narrows the ceiling.
